title: Spicy Chewy Show-off Jamaican Banana Stir-fry
description: This dish combines spicy banana with a hint of honey to create a show-stopping culinary experience that is both chewy and flavorful.

ingredients.name: Spicy Seasoning Mix (like Jamaican jerk seasoning)

instructions: Peel and finely chop the bananas.
In a large skillet, heat a tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped bananas and honey, cooking until they start to brown slightly.
Add spicy seasoning mix, salt, pepper, soy sauce, garlic powder, and onion powder to the banana mixture. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes or until the banana becomes chewy and fully coated with spices.
Serve hot as a side dish or enjoy it on its own as a snack.
